category_sources: Official GitHub README describes CLI Proxy API as a proxy server providing OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex/Grok-compatible API interfaces for CLI.
source_facts.description says it wraps Gemini CLI, Codex, Claude Code, and Qwen Code as an API service.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is CLI Proxy API.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links CLIProxyAPI Guides at help.router-for.me.
Official help.router-for.me Quick Start is a dedicated documentation page.
Official repository contains a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex/Grok-compatible API endpoints and provider routing.
source_facts.description identifies wrapped CLI AI tools and API-service role.
